error_signature: unable to save or access workflows
title: Unable to save or access workflows in n8n V2
symptom: Users experience issues where workflows do not save or cannot be accessed when using a custom HTTP port on a cloud VM.
applies_when: Accessing via a custom HTTP port
root_cause: Chrome treats localhost as a secure origin, but when accessing n8n via a local network IP, it does not. This leads to issues with saving and accessing workflows due to mixed content security policies.
fix_steps: Enable the setting to treat your local network IP as secure.
Enter your n8n URLs in the provided text box, separated by commas.
Click the 'Relaunch' button to restart Chrome.
agent_instruction: Enable the insecure origin setting in Chrome and relaunch the browser.
